 1. Clone the repository:
 ```bash
 git clone https://github.com/DerekBoat1023/Fifa-Boat-2026.git
 cd Fifa-Boat-2026
 ```
 
 2. Install dependencies:
 ```bash
 npm install
 ```
 
 3. Start the development server:
 ```bash
 npm start
 ```
 
 4. Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) in your browser
 
 ## Deployment to Vercel
 
 1. Push code to GitHub
 2. Connect your repo to Vercel at [vercel.com](https://vercel.com)
 3. Vercel will auto-detect it as a React app and deploy automatically
 4. Your app will be live at a URL like `fifa-boat-2026.vercel.app`
 
-## CSV Upload Format
+## CSV Upload Format
 
 ### Discovery CSV
 - Match #
 - Event Name
 - Price Min, Price P25, Price P50
 - Ticket Qty, Visits L7D, Trans L7D
 
 ### Inventory CSV
 - Match #
 - Event Name
 - Total Qty, Sold Qty, P&L, Unsold Cost Basis
 
-### Event-by-Event CSV
-- Match #, Sale ID
-- Qty, Unit Cost, Unit Proceeds
-- Marketplace, Category
+### Event-by-Event CSV
+- Match #, Sale ID
+- Qty, Unit Cost, Unit Proceeds
+- Marketplace, Category
+
+## Ongoing Data Refresh Workflow (Recommended)
+
+The app now checks data sources by category (Discovery, Inventory, Event-by-Event) and loads the first matching file it finds from a candidate list in `index.html` (`DATA_SOURCES`).
+This lets you keep files separate while still giving the app a predictable source order.
+
+### Update steps
+
+1. Export fresh data using the same column format as the templates.
+2. Add/replace updated files in repo root for each category:
+   - Discovery (CSV or XLSX)
+   - Inventory (XLSX)
+   - Event-by-Event (XLSX)
+3. Commit and push.
+4. Redeploy (or let Vercel auto-deploy on push).
+5. Open the app and verify the header status line shows which files were loaded for each category.
+
+### Troubleshooting
+
+- If the app appears blank, hard-refresh the page and check the header status line.
+- If status shows fallback/error, open browser console for details and confirm file names match one of the `DATA_SOURCES` candidates in `index.html`.
+
+### Final pre-live checklist
+
+- Confirm `FIFA_CSV-UpdatedTemplates.xlsx` is present and up to date.
+- Verify key tabs render expected values:
+  - All Events (prices/qty/visits)
+  - Portfolio / P&L (inventory + sales)
+  - Price Hunter / Hot Picks (derived calculations)
+- Spot-check 3–5 known matches against source exports.
+- If there is a data mismatch, regenerate/export templates and redeploy.
 
 ## Tournament Data
 
 - **48 Teams** across 12 groups (A-L)
 - **104 Total Matches** (72 group stage + 32 knockout)
 - **16 Venues** across USA, Mexico, Canada
 - **3/10/2026 Market Pricing** with real inventory and sales data
 
 ## Technology Stack
 
 - React 18
 - Tailwind CSS
 - PapaParse (CSV handling)
 - Lucide React (Icons)
 - Node.js / Vercel (Hosting)
 
 ## Support
 
 For questions or issues, contact the FIFA Sales Hub team.

 // ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 function getLatest(matchNum) {
   const snaps = PRICES[String(matchNum)];
   return snaps && snaps.length ? snaps[snaps.length - 1] : null;
 }
 function getSnap(matchNum, date) {
   const snaps = PRICES[String(matchNum)] || [];
   return snaps.find(s => s.date === date) || null;
 }
 function getSent(name) {
   if (!name) return 5;
   let best = 0;
   name.split(' vs ').forEach(p => { const s = SENTIMENTS[p.trim()]; if (s > best) best = s; });
   return best || 5;
@@ -223,62 +226,273 @@ function updown(v) {
   if (v == null) return '<span class="flat">—</span>';
   if (v > 0.5) return '<span class="up">↑ +' + v.toFixed(1) + '%</span>';
   if (v < -0.5) return '<span class="down">↓ ' + v.toFixed(1) + '%</span>';
   return '<span class="flat">—</span>';
 }
 function badges(pos, gtx) {
   let h = '';
   if (pos) h += '<a href="' + pos + '" target="_blank" class="badge badge-pos" style="margin-right:4px">POS</a>';
   if (gtx) h += '<a href="' + gtx + '" target="_blank" class="badge badge-gtx">GoTix</a>';
   return h;
 }
 function getState(loc) {
   if (!loc) return 'Unknown';
   const p = loc.split(', ');
   return p.length >= 2 ? p[p.length - 2] : p[0];
 }
 function pctChange(matchNum, refDate) {
   const snaps = PRICES[String(matchNum)] || [];
   if (snaps.length < 2) return null;
   const latest = snaps[snaps.length - 1];
   const ref = snaps.find(s => s.date === refDate) || snaps[snaps.length - 2];
   if (!ref || !ref.p50 || !latest.p50) return null;
   return (latest.p50 - ref.p50) / ref.p50 * 100;
 }
 
+function normalizeKey(k) {
+  return String(k || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
+}
+function normalizeRow(row) {
+  const out = {};
+  Object.entries(row || {}).forEach(([k, v]) => out[normalizeKey(k)] = v);
+  return out;
+}
+function toNum(v) {
+  if (v == null) return null;
+  const s = String(v).replace(/[$,%\s"]/g, '').replace(/,/g, '');
+  if (!s) return null;
+  const n = Number(s);
+  return isNaN(n) ? null : n;
+}
+function asMargin(v) {
+  const n = toNum(v);
+  if (n == null) return 0;
+  return n > 1 ? n / 100 : n;
+}
+function parseDateMd(v) {
+  if (!v) return '';
+  const d = new Date(v);
+  if (!isNaN(d.getTime())) return `${d.getMonth() + 1}/${d.getDate()}`;
+  const m = String(v).match(/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})/);
+  return m ? `${m[1]}/${m[2]}` : '';
+}
+function upsertPriceSnapshot(match, snap) {
+  const key = String(match);
+  if (!PRICES[key]) PRICES[key] = [];
+  const i = PRICES[key].findIndex(s => s.date === snap.date);
+  if (i >= 0) PRICES[key][i] = snap;
+  else PRICES[key].push(snap);
+  PRICES[key].sort((a, b) => String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));
+}
+
+const DATA_SOURCES = {
+  discovery: [
+    '3-28 world cup discovery.csv',
+    '3-26 world cup discovery.csv',
+    '3-10 UPDATED DISCOVERY [3-2 to 3_10].csv',
+    'FIFA_Discovery_3-26.xlsx',
+    'FIFA_MASTER_3-26 (1).xlsx',
+    'FIFA_MASTER_3-26.xlsx'
+  ],
+  inventory: [
+    'FIFA - BY LISTING-3-26.xlsx',
+    'Fifa - Inventory - sold and unsold 3-10.xlsx',
+    'FIFA INVENTORY REPORT-3-26.xlsx'
+  ],
+  eventByEvent: [
+    '!! FIFA - Event-by-Event 3-26.xlsx',
+    'World Cup Event by Event 3-10.xlsx'
+  ]
+};
+
+async function parseTabular(path) {
+  const res = await fetch(path, { cache: 'no-store' });
+  if (!res.ok) return null;
+  if (path.toLowerCase().endsWith('.csv')) {
+    if (!window.Papa) return null;
+    const text = await res.text();
+    const parsed = Papa.parse(text, { header: true, skipEmptyLines: true });
+    return parsed.errors?.length ? null : (parsed.data || []);
+  }
+  if (path.toLowerCase().endsWith('.xlsx') && window.XLSX) {
+    const buf = await res.arrayBuffer();
+    const wb = XLSX.read(buf, { type: 'array' });
+    const first = wb.SheetNames[0];
+    if (!first) return null;
+    return XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets[first], { defval: '' });
+  }
+  return null;
+}
+
+async function loadFirstAvailable(type) {
+  for (const path of DATA_SOURCES[type] || []) {
+    const rows = await parseTabular(path);
+    if (rows && rows.length) return { path, rows };
+  }
+  return null;
+}
+
+function applyDiscovery(rows) {
+  let updates = 0;
+  rows.forEach(r => {
+    const n = normalizeRow(r);
+    const match = toNum(n.match || n.matchnumber);
+    const dateRaw = n.listingdate || n.date;
+    const dateObj = new Date(dateRaw);
+    const dateIso = !isNaN(dateObj.getTime()) ? dateObj.toISOString().slice(0, 10) : null;
+    const p50 = toNum(n.pricep50);
+    if (!match || !dateIso || p50 == null) return;
+    upsertPriceSnapshot(match, {
+      date: dateIso,
+      pMin: toNum(n.pricemin) ?? p50,
+      p25: toNum(n.pricep25) ?? p50,
+      p50,
+      qty: toNum(n.ticketqty) ?? 0,
+      v7d: toNum(n.visitsl7d) ?? 0,
+      t7: toNum(n.transactionsl7d) ?? 0,
+      listQty: toNum(n.listingqt || n.listingqty) ?? 0
+    });
+    updates += 1;
+  });
+  return updates;
+}
+
+function applyInventory(rows) {
+  const invByEvent = new Map();
+  rows.forEach(r => {
+    const n = normalizeRow(r);
+    const eventId = String(n.eventid || '').trim();
+    if (!eventId) return;
+    const soldQty = toNum(n.soldquantity) ?? 0;
+    const unsoldQty = toNum(n.unsoldquantity) ?? 0;
+    const soldRevenue = toNum(n.soldproceeds) ?? 0;
+    const soldCost = toNum(n.soldcost) ?? 0;
+    const unsoldCost = toNum(n.unsoldcost) ?? 0;
+    const pl = toNum(n.pl) ?? 0;
+    const item = invByEvent.get(eventId) || {
+      eventId, event: n.eventname || '', totalQty: 0, soldQty: 0, unsoldQty: 0,
+      soldRevenue: 0, soldCost: 0, unsoldCost: 0, pl: 0, margin: 0
+    };
+    item.event = item.event || n.eventname || '';
+    item.soldQty += soldQty;
+    item.unsoldQty += unsoldQty;
+    item.totalQty += soldQty + unsoldQty;
+    item.soldRevenue += soldRevenue;
+    item.soldCost += soldCost;
+    item.unsoldCost += unsoldCost;
+    item.pl += pl;
+    invByEvent.set(eventId, item);
+  });
+  if (!invByEvent.size) return 0;
+  INVENTORY.length = 0;
+  invByEvent.forEach(v => {
+    v.margin = v.soldRevenue > 0 ? v.pl / v.soldRevenue : 0;
+    INVENTORY.push(v);
+  });
+  return INVENTORY.length;
+}
+
+function applyEventByEvent(rows) {
+  const sales = [];
+  let totalProceeds = 0, totalCost = 0, totalPL = 0, qtySold = 0;
+  rows.forEach(r => {
+    const n = normalizeRow(r);
+    const qty = toNum(n.soldquantity) ?? toNum(n.qty) ?? 0;
+    const proceeds = toNum(n.soldproceeds) ?? toNum(n.unitproceeds) ?? 0;
+    const cost = toNum(n.soldcost) ?? toNum(n.unitcost) ?? 0;
+    const pl = toNum(n.pl) ?? (proceeds - cost);
+    if (qty <= 0 && proceeds <= 0) return;
+    sales.push({
+      event: n.eventname || `${n.team1 || ''} vs ${n.team2 || ''}`.trim(),
+      saleDate: parseDateMd(n.eventdate || n.saledate || ''),
+      qty, proceeds, cost, pl,
+      margin: proceeds > 0 ? pl / proceeds : 0
+    });
+    totalProceeds += proceeds;
+    totalCost += cost;
+    totalPL += pl;
+    qtySold += qty;
+  });
+  if (!sales.length) return 0;
+  SALES.sales = sales;
+  SALES.totals = {
+    totalProceeds, totalCost, totalPL, qtySold,
+    margin: totalProceeds > 0 ? totalPL / totalProceeds : 0,
+    avgUnitPL: qtySold > 0 ? totalPL / qtySold : 0
+  };
+  return sales.length;
+}
+
+async function hydrateDataSources() {
+  const statusEl = document.getElementById('data-status');
+  if (!statusEl) return;
+  try {
+    const loaded = [];
+
+    const d = await loadFirstAvailable('discovery');
+    if (d) {
+      const count = applyDiscovery(d.rows);
+      loaded.push(`Discovery: ${d.path} (${count})`);
+    }
+    const i = await loadFirstAvailable('inventory');
+    if (i) {
+      const count = applyInventory(i.rows);
+      if (count) loaded.push(`Inventory: ${i.path} (${count})`);
+    }
+    const e = await loadFirstAvailable('eventByEvent');
+    if (e) {
+      const count = applyEventByEvent(e.rows);
+      if (count) loaded.push(`E2E: ${e.path} (${count})`);
+    }
+
+    _movers = null;
+    renderAllEvents();
+    renderTeamPaths();
+    renderTrendsOverview();
+    renderPortStats();
+    renderPortSummary();
+    renderHotPicks();
+    renderVenueScout();
+    renderPriceHunter();
+    statusEl.textContent = loaded.length ? loaded.join(' | ') : 'Using embedded dataset (no external data files found)';
+  } catch (err) {
+    statusEl.textContent = 'Using embedded dataset (external load failed)';
+  }
+}
+
 // ── Generic sortable table ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 // state: { key, asc }
 const sortStates = {};
 
 function makeHead(tableId, cols) {
   const st = sortStates[tableId] || {key: cols[0].key, asc: true};
   return cols.map(c => {
     const align = c.right ? ' r' : c.center ? ' c' : '';
     if (!c.key) return '<th class="' + align.trim() + '">' + c.label + '</th>';
     const active = st.key === c.key ? ' sort-active' : '';
     const arrow = st.key === c.key ? (st.asc ? ' ↑' : ' ↓') : ' <span style="opacity:.3">↕</span>';
-    return '<th class="sortable' + active + align + '" onclick="doSort('' + tableId + '','' + c.key + '')">' + c.label + arrow + '</th>';
+    return '<th class="sortable' + active + align + '" onclick="doSort(\'' + tableId + '\',\'' + c.key + '\')">' + c.label + arrow + '</th>';
   }).join('');
 }
 
 function doSort(tableId, key) {
   const st = sortStates[tableId] || {key, asc: true};
   if (st.key === key) st.asc = !st.asc;
   else { st.key = key; st.asc = true; }
   sortStates[tableId] = st;
   // Re-render the appropriate tab
   const renders = {
     'events-table': renderAllEvents,
     'picks-table': renderHotPicks,
     'venue-table': renderVenueScout,
     'hunter-table': renderPriceHunter,
     'paths-table': renderTeamPaths,
     'movers-table': renderMoversTable,
     'port-inv-table': renderPortSummary,
     'port-sales-table': renderPortSales,
     'deepdive-table': renderDeepDive
   };
   if (renders[tableId]) renders[tableId]();
 }

 const REF_DATE = '2026-03-10'; // baseline for "since 3/10" analysis
 
 function getPhase(eventName) {
   const nm = eventName.toLowerCase();
   if (nm.includes('round of 32')) return 'Round of 32';
   if (nm.includes('round of 16')) return 'Round of 16';
   if (nm.includes('quarterfinal')) return 'Quarterfinal';
   if (nm.includes('semifinal')) return 'Semifinal';
   if (nm.includes('final')) return 'Final';
   return 'Group Stage';
 }
 
 function getTeamNames(name) {
   const teams = name.split(' vs ').map(t => t.trim());
   return {teamA: teams[0] || '', teamB: teams[1] || ''};
 }
 
 const EVENT_META = EVENTS.map(e => ({
   ...e,
   phase: getPhase(e.name),
   ...getTeamNames(e.name)
 }));

 function computeMovers() {
   return EVENTS.map(e => {
     const snaps = PRICES[String(e.match)] || [];
     if (snaps.length < 2) return null;
     const latest = snaps[snaps.length - 1];
     const ref = snaps.find(s => s.date === REF_DATE) || snaps[snaps.length - 2];
     if (!ref || !ref.p50 || !latest.p50) return null;
     const pct = (latest.p50 - ref.p50) / ref.p50 * 100;
     return {
       match: e.match, name: e.name, venue: e.venue,
       refP50: ref.p50, latestP50: latest.p50,
       absChange: latest.p50 - ref.p50, pctChange: pct,
       v7d: latest.v7d, qty: latest.qty,
       sent: getSent(e.name), pos: e.pos, gotix: e.gotix
     };
   }).filter(Boolean);
 }
 
 let _movers = null;
 function getMovers() {
   if (!_movers) _movers = computeMovers();
   return _movers;
 }

 ## Deployment to Vercel
 
 1. Push code to GitHub
 2. Connect your repo to Vercel at [vercel.com](https://vercel.com)
 3. Vercel will auto-detect it as a React app and deploy automatically
 4. Your app will be live at a URL like `fifa-boat-2026.vercel.app`

+## Ongoing Data Refresh Workflow (Recommended)
+
+The app now checks data sources by category (Discovery, Inventory, Event-by-Event) and loads the first matching file it finds from a candidate list in `index.html` (`DATA_SOURCES`).
+This lets you keep files separate while still giving the app a predictable source order.
+
+### Update steps
+
+1. Export fresh data using the same column format as the templates.
+2. Add/replace updated files in repo root for each category:
+   - Discovery (CSV or XLSX)
+   - Inventory (XLSX)
+   - Event-by-Event (XLSX)
+3. Commit and push.
+4. Redeploy (or let Vercel auto-deploy on push).
+5. Open the app and verify the header status line shows which files were loaded for each category.
+
+### Troubleshooting
+
+- If the app appears blank, hard-refresh the page and check the header status line.
+- If status shows fallback/error, open browser console for details and confirm file names match one of the `DATA_SOURCES` candidates in `index.html`.
+
+### Final pre-live checklist
+
+- Confirm `FIFA_CSV-UpdatedTemplates.xlsx` is present and up to date.
+- Verify key tabs render expected values:
+  - All Events (prices/qty/visits)
+  - Portfolio / P&L (inventory + sales)
+  - Price Hunter / Hot Picks (derived calculations)
+- Spot-check 3–5 known matches against source exports.
+- If there is a data mismatch, regenerate/export templates and redeploy.
 
 ## Tournament Data
 
 - **48 Teams** across 12 groups (A-L)
 - **104 Total Matches** (72 group stage + 32 knockout)
 - **16 Venues** across USA, Mexico, Canada
 - **3/10/2026 Market Pricing** with real inventory and sales data
 
 ## Technology Stack
 
 - React 18
 - Tailwind CSS
 - PapaParse (CSV handling)
 - Lucide React (Icons)
 - Node.js / Vercel (Hosting)
 
 ## Support
 
 For questions or issues, contact the FIFA Sales Hub team.

 // ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 function getLatest(matchNum) {
   const snaps = PRICES[String(matchNum)];
   return snaps && snaps.length ? snaps[snaps.length - 1] : null;
 }
 function getSnap(matchNum, date) {
   const snaps = PRICES[String(matchNum)] || [];
   return snaps.find(s => s.date === date) || null;
 }
 function getSent(name) {
   if (!name) return 5;
   let best = 0;
   name.split(' vs ').forEach(p => { const s = SENTIMENTS[p.trim()]; if (s > best) best = s; });
   return best || 5;
@@ -223,62 +226,273 @@ function updown(v) {
   if (v == null) return '<span class="flat">—</span>';
   if (v > 0.5) return '<span class="up">↑ +' + v.toFixed(1) + '%</span>';
   if (v < -0.5) return '<span class="down">↓ ' + v.toFixed(1) + '%</span>';
   return '<span class="flat">—</span>';
 }
 function badges(pos, gtx) {
   let h = '';
   if (pos) h += '<a href="' + pos + '" target="_blank" class="badge badge-pos" style="margin-right:4px">POS</a>';
   if (gtx) h += '<a href="' + gtx + '" target="_blank" class="badge badge-gtx">GoTix</a>';
   return h;
 }
 function getState(loc) {
   if (!loc) return 'Unknown';
   const p = loc.split(', ');
   return p.length >= 2 ? p[p.length - 2] : p[0];
 }
 function pctChange(matchNum, refDate) {
   const snaps = PRICES[String(matchNum)] || [];
   if (snaps.length < 2) return null;
   const latest = snaps[snaps.length - 1];
   const ref = snaps.find(s => s.date === refDate) || snaps[snaps.length - 2];
   if (!ref || !ref.p50 || !latest.p50) return null;
   return (latest.p50 - ref.p50) / ref.p50 * 100;
 }
 
+function normalizeKey(k) {
+  return String(k || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '');
+}
+function normalizeRow(row) {
+  const out = {};
+  Object.entries(row || {}).forEach(([k, v]) => out[normalizeKey(k)] = v);
+  return out;
+}
+function toNum(v) {
+  if (v == null) return null;
+  const s = String(v).replace(/[$,%\s"]/g, '').replace(/,/g, '');
+  if (!s) return null;
+  const n = Number(s);
+  return isNaN(n) ? null : n;
+}
+function asMargin(v) {
+  const n = toNum(v);
+  if (n == null) return 0;
+  return n > 1 ? n / 100 : n;
+}
+function parseDateMd(v) {
+  if (!v) return '';
+  const d = new Date(v);
+  if (!isNaN(d.getTime())) return `${d.getMonth() + 1}/${d.getDate()}`;
+  const m = String(v).match(/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})/);
+  return m ? `${m[1]}/${m[2]}` : '';
+}
+function upsertPriceSnapshot(match, snap) {
+  const key = String(match);
+  if (!PRICES[key]) PRICES[key] = [];
+  const i = PRICES[key].findIndex(s => s.date === snap.date);
+  if (i >= 0) PRICES[key][i] = snap;
+  else PRICES[key].push(snap);
+  PRICES[key].sort((a, b) => String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));
+}
+
+const DATA_SOURCES = {
+  discovery: [
+    '3-28 world cup discovery.csv',
+    '3-26 world cup discovery.csv',
+    '3-10 UPDATED DISCOVERY [3-2 to 3_10].csv',
+    'FIFA_Discovery_3-26.xlsx',
+    'FIFA_MASTER_3-26 (1).xlsx',
+    'FIFA_MASTER_3-26.xlsx'
+  ],
+  inventory: [
+    'FIFA - BY LISTING-3-26.xlsx',
+    'Fifa - Inventory - sold and unsold 3-10.xlsx',
+    'FIFA INVENTORY REPORT-3-26.xlsx'
+  ],
+  eventByEvent: [
+    '!! FIFA - Event-by-Event 3-26.xlsx',
+    'World Cup Event by Event 3-10.xlsx'
+  ]
+};
+
+async function parseTabular(path) {
+  const res = await fetch(path, { cache: 'no-store' });
+  if (!res.ok) return null;
+  if (path.toLowerCase().endsWith('.csv')) {
+    if (!window.Papa) return null;
+    const text = await res.text();
+    const parsed = Papa.parse(text, { header: true, skipEmptyLines: true });
+    return parsed.errors?.length ? null : (parsed.data || []);
+  }
+  if (path.toLowerCase().endsWith('.xlsx') && window.XLSX) {
+    const buf = await res.arrayBuffer();
+    const wb = XLSX.read(buf, { type: 'array' });
+    const first = wb.SheetNames[0];
+    if (!first) return null;
+    return XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets[first], { defval: '' });
+  }
+  return null;
+}
+
+async function loadFirstAvailable(type) {
+  for (const path of DATA_SOURCES[type] || []) {
+    const rows = await parseTabular(path);
+    if (rows && rows.length) return { path, rows };
+  }
+  return null;
+}
+
+function applyDiscovery(rows) {
+  let updates = 0;
+  rows.forEach(r => {
+    const n = normalizeRow(r);
+    const match = toNum(n.match || n.matchnumber);
+    const dateRaw = n.listingdate || n.date;
+    const dateObj = new Date(dateRaw);
+    const dateIso = !isNaN(dateObj.getTime()) ? dateObj.toISOString().slice(0, 10) : null;
+    const p50 = toNum(n.pricep50);
+    if (!match || !dateIso || p50 == null) return;
+    upsertPriceSnapshot(match, {
+      date: dateIso,
+      pMin: toNum(n.pricemin) ?? p50,
+      p25: toNum(n.pricep25) ?? p50,
+      p50,
+      qty: toNum(n.ticketqty) ?? 0,
+      v7d: toNum(n.visitsl7d) ?? 0,
+      t7: toNum(n.transactionsl7d) ?? 0,
+      listQty: toNum(n.listingqt || n.listingqty) ?? 0
+    });
+    updates += 1;
+  });
+  return updates;
+}
+
+function applyInventory(rows) {
+  const invByEvent = new Map();
+  rows.forEach(r => {
+    const n = normalizeRow(r);
+    const eventId = String(n.eventid || '').trim();
+    if (!eventId) return;
+    const soldQty = toNum(n.soldquantity) ?? 0;
+    const unsoldQty = toNum(n.unsoldquantity) ?? 0;
+    const soldRevenue = toNum(n.soldproceeds) ?? 0;
+    const soldCost = toNum(n.soldcost) ?? 0;
+    const unsoldCost = toNum(n.unsoldcost) ?? 0;
+    const pl = toNum(n.pl) ?? 0;
+    const item = invByEvent.get(eventId) || {
+      eventId, event: n.eventname || '', totalQty: 0, soldQty: 0, unsoldQty: 0,
+      soldRevenue: 0, soldCost: 0, unsoldCost: 0, pl: 0, margin: 0
+    };
+    item.event = item.event || n.eventname || '';
+    item.soldQty += soldQty;
+    item.unsoldQty += unsoldQty;
+    item.totalQty += soldQty + unsoldQty;
+    item.soldRevenue += soldRevenue;
+    item.soldCost += soldCost;
+    item.unsoldCost += unsoldCost;
+    item.pl += pl;
+    invByEvent.set(eventId, item);
+  });
+  if (!invByEvent.size) return 0;
+  INVENTORY.length = 0;
+  invByEvent.forEach(v => {
+    v.margin = v.soldRevenue > 0 ? v.pl / v.soldRevenue : 0;
+    INVENTORY.push(v);
+  });
+  return INVENTORY.length;
+}
+
+function applyEventByEvent(rows) {
+  const sales = [];
+  let totalProceeds = 0, totalCost = 0, totalPL = 0, qtySold = 0;
+  rows.forEach(r => {
+    const n = normalizeRow(r);
+    const qty = toNum(n.soldquantity) ?? toNum(n.qty) ?? 0;
+    const proceeds = toNum(n.soldproceeds) ?? toNum(n.unitproceeds) ?? 0;
+    const cost = toNum(n.soldcost) ?? toNum(n.unitcost) ?? 0;
+    const pl = toNum(n.pl) ?? (proceeds - cost);
+    if (qty <= 0 && proceeds <= 0) return;
+    sales.push({
+      event: n.eventname || `${n.team1 || ''} vs ${n.team2 || ''}`.trim(),
+      saleDate: parseDateMd(n.eventdate || n.saledate || ''),
+      qty, proceeds, cost, pl,
+      margin: proceeds > 0 ? pl / proceeds : 0
+    });
+    totalProceeds += proceeds;
+    totalCost += cost;
+    totalPL += pl;
+    qtySold += qty;
+  });
+  if (!sales.length) return 0;
+  SALES.sales = sales;
+  SALES.totals = {
+    totalProceeds, totalCost, totalPL, qtySold,
+    margin: totalProceeds > 0 ? totalPL / totalProceeds : 0,
+    avgUnitPL: qtySold > 0 ? totalPL / qtySold : 0
+  };
+  return sales.length;
+}
+
+async function hydrateDataSources() {
+  const statusEl = document.getElementById('data-status');
+  if (!statusEl) return;
+  try {
+    const loaded = [];
+
+    const d = await loadFirstAvailable('discovery');
+    if (d) {
+      const count = applyDiscovery(d.rows);
+      loaded.push(`Discovery: ${d.path} (${count})`);
+    }
+    const i = await loadFirstAvailable('inventory');
+    if (i) {
+      const count = applyInventory(i.rows);
+      if (count) loaded.push(`Inventory: ${i.path} (${count})`);
+    }
+    const e = await loadFirstAvailable('eventByEvent');
+    if (e) {
+      const count = applyEventByEvent(e.rows);
+      if (count) loaded.push(`E2E: ${e.path} (${count})`);
+    }
+
+    _movers = null;
+    renderAllEvents();
+    renderTeamPaths();
+    renderTrendsOverview();
+    renderPortStats();
+    renderPortSummary();
+    renderHotPicks();
+    renderVenueScout();
+    renderPriceHunter();
+    statusEl.textContent = loaded.length ? loaded.join(' | ') : 'Using embedded dataset (no external data files found)';
+  } catch (err) {
+    statusEl.textContent = 'Using embedded dataset (external load failed)';
+  }
+}

 // ── Generic sortable table ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 // state: { key, asc }
 const sortStates = {};
 
 function makeHead(tableId, cols) {
   const st = sortStates[tableId] || {key: cols[0].key, asc: true};
   return cols.map(c => {
     const align = c.right ? ' r' : c.center ? ' c' : '';
     if (!c.key) return '<th class="' + align.trim() + '">' + c.label + '</th>';
     const active = st.key === c.key ? ' sort-active' : '';
     const arrow = st.key === c.key ? (st.asc ? ' ↑' : ' ↓') : ' <span style="opacity:.3">↕</span>';
-    return '<th class="sortable' + active + align + '" onclick="doSort('' + tableId + '','' + c.key + '')">' + c.label + arrow + '</th>';
+    return '<th class="sortable' + active + align + '" onclick="doSort(\'' + tableId + '\',\'' + c.key + '\')">' + c.label + arrow + '</th>';
   }).join('');
 }
 
 function doSort(tableId, key) {
   const st = sortStates[tableId] || {key, asc: true};
   if (st.key === key) st.asc = !st.asc;
   else { st.key = key; st.asc = true; }
   sortStates[tableId] = st;
   // Re-render the appropriate tab
   const renders = {
     'events-table': renderAllEvents,
     'picks-table': renderHotPicks,
     'venue-table': renderVenueScout,
     'hunter-table': renderPriceHunter,
     'paths-table': renderTeamPaths,
     'movers-table': renderMoversTable,
     'port-inv-table': renderPortSummary,
     'port-sales-table': renderPortSales,
     'deepdive-table': renderDeepDive
   };
   if (renders[tableId]) renders[tableId]();
 }

 const REF_DATE = '2026-03-10'; // baseline for "since 3/10" analysis
 
 function getPhase(eventName) {
   const nm = eventName.toLowerCase();
   if (nm.includes('round of 32')) return 'Round of 32';
   if (nm.includes('round of 16')) return 'Round of 16';
   if (nm.includes('quarterfinal')) return 'Quarterfinal';
   if (nm.includes('semifinal')) return 'Semifinal';
   if (nm.includes('final')) return 'Final';
   return 'Group Stage';
 }
 
 function getTeamNames(name) {
   const teams = name.split(' vs ').map(t => t.trim());
   return {teamA: teams[0] || '', teamB: teams[1] || ''};
 }
 
 const EVENT_META = EVENTS.map(e => ({
   ...e,
   phase: getPhase(e.name),
   ...getTeamNames(e.name)
 }));

 function computeMovers() {
   return EVENTS.map(e => {
     const snaps = PRICES[String(e.match)] || [];
     if (snaps.length < 2) return null;
     const latest = snaps[snaps.length - 1];
     const ref = snaps.find(s => s.date === REF_DATE) || snaps[snaps.length - 2];
     if (!ref || !ref.p50 || !latest.p50) return null;
     const pct = (latest.p50 - ref.p50) / ref.p50 * 100;
     return {
       match: e.match, name: e.name, venue: e.venue,
       refP50: ref.p50, latestP50: latest.p50,
       absChange: latest.p50 - ref.p50, pctChange: pct,
       v7d: latest.v7d, qty: latest.qty,
       sent: getSent(e.name), pos: e.pos, gotix: e.gotix
     };
   }).filter(Boolean);
 }
 
 let _movers = null;
 function getMovers() {
   if (!_movers) _movers = computeMovers();
   return _movers;
 }
